name: Twitch-Drops-Miner
description: An unofficial Docker container for automatically mining Twitch drops with a web-based GUI interface. It watches Twitch streams on your behalf to earn and claim rewards. Note: Use at your own risk and ensure compliance with Twitch Terms of Service. Issues should NOT be reported to the original TwitchDropsMiner project.

paths.name: Config
paths.description: Twitch Drops Miner configuration, cookies, and cache.

ports.name: WebUI
ports.description: Web interface for configuration and monitoring (if enabled).

variables.name: Twitch Username
variables.description: Your Twitch username for automatic login (optional, can be set in web UI).

variables.name: Twitch Password
variables.description: Your Twitch password for automatic login (optional, can be set in web UI).

variables.name: Headless Mode
variables.description: Run browser in headless mode (true/false). Headless uses less resources.

variables.name: Auto Start
variables.description: Automatically start mining on container start (true/false).
